content.scenarioHint: 你在工作汇报结束前，想礼貌地征求对方的最终意见或反馈，以体现专业和尊重。
content.speakerText: Just to confirm, does everything look good on your end before we close this out?
content.speakerTextCn: 在我们结束之前，确认一下，您这边是否一切都满意？
expectedAnswers: Everything looks great—thanks for your time!
All set from my side. Great summary!
No further changes needed. Well done!
Appreciate the update. Keep me posted on next steps.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了征求最终反馈的意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否符合职场英语口语习惯，语气得体
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'close out', 'everything looks good', 'appreciate' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: We’ve covered everything—how would you like to wrap this up?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们已经讲完了所有内容——你希望怎么结束这次沟通？
expectedAnswers: Everything looks on track. Let’s connect next week if needed.
Appreciate your effort. I’ll review the documents and get back if I have questions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动结束对话，未拖延或转移话题
语言准确性：使用了恰当的结束语结构，如 'Thanks for...', 'Let’s connect...', 'I'll get back...'
表达自然度：语气自然，符合职场对话节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了至少两个场景关键词如 'appreciate', 'thanks', 'keep me posted', 'connect'
